transcript.final_response:
Excellent! All tasks completed successfully:

## Summary

✅ **Archive Created**: `/tmp/project.tar.gz` (228 bytes)
- Created using: `tar -czf /tmp/project.tar.gz -C / project`

✅ **Backup Directory Created**: `/backup`
- Created with: `mkdir -p /backup`

✅ **Archive Extracted**: 
- Extracted using: `tar -xzf /tmp/project.tar.gz -C /backup`

✅ **Files Verified**: Both files exist in the backup location:
- `/backup/project/README.md` - Contains project description
- `/backup/project/src/main.sh` - Contains a bash script

The backup is complete and all files have been successfully preserved!
tool_calls:
# Create tar.gz archive of /project directory
tar -czf /tmp/project.tar.gz -C / project 2>&1
echo "Archive created. Checking file size:"
ls -lh /tmp/project.tar.gz

# Verify archive contents
echo -e "\nArchive contents preview:"
tar -tzf /tmp/project.tar.gz | head -20

# Create /backup directory
mkdir -p /backup

# Extract the archive into /backup
tar -xzf /tmp/project.tar.gz -C /backup

echo "Extraction complete. Verifying files in /backup:"
ls -lh /backup/
echo -e "\nDirectory structure:"
find /backup -type f

echo "=== File verification ==="
echo -e "\nREADME.md content:"
cat /backup/project/README.md

echo -e "\n\nmain.sh content:"
cat /backup/project/src/main.sh

echo -e "\n\n=== Summary ==="
echo "✓ Archive created: /tmp/project.tar.gz"
echo "✓ /backup directory created"
echo "✓ Archive extracted to /backup"
echo "✓ Files verified:"
find /backup -type f -exec echo "  - {}" \;
